projects.name: F1 Predictions
projects.summary: Calibrated race-outcome forecasts for every Formula 1 Grand Prix.
projects.description: The MotorsportVerse flagship. A three-pathway prediction engine — qualifying-pace regression, Plackett-Luce probability calibration, and a per-lap Monte Carlo race simulator — with continuous-learning infrastructure (model registry, drift detection, A/B promotion) and a live static-export dashboard. Reference implementation for all other projects.

projects.name: RaceIQ F2
projects.summary: Sprint, feature-race, and championship forecasts for FIA Formula 2.
projects.description: A purpose-built spec-series model: a leakage-safe driver-skill blend (Elo with rookie pooling + finishing history) routed through two race-type heads — a merit feature race and a reverse-grid sprint — with Monte Carlo win/podium probabilities, finishing-range intervals, a sprint+feature-aware championship projection, forward-eval, and drift/promotion monitoring. Full website with per-round sprint/feature detail, head-to-head matrices, and an accuracy dashboard. ~75% reuses MotorsportVerse core. Phase 1 runs on a reproducible synthetic source; a live F2 feed lands in Phase 2.
